data.name: textBox
data.heading: COOLER
data.body:
Hey gang, for tomorrow I know we're discussing stuff for upcoming crit. Maybe we can spend like 30ish mins on that and for the rest of the time we can do making updates... 

just share about what we've been upto for the past week (doesn't have to pertain to only thesis related making) feel free to share other stuff too. If you wanna discuss the work with us or have any questions, have some talking points ready.
